calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2005 Off Calendar

Minors' Compromise (3) In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-21-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Three Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: June Leathley.
Kaiser Khan, Esq. for Petitioner: Shabana Hakim, present as Guardian at litem for: , Ramsha Hameed; Husnaa Saleem and Shoyeb Saleem, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved for each minor as follows:
Attorney's Fees $375.00
Costs $175.72
A net balance of $949.28 to the petitioner, to be held in trust for the benefit of each minor.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
